title: Ayee Milan Ki Bela
actors: Rajendra Kumar Tuli, Saira Banu, Dharmendra
plot: Shyam works for Mr. Choudhry, and lives in a small village in India with his mother. Ranjeet, Shyam's childhood friend, returns from overseas, and all are overjoyed to see him back. Ranjeet and Shyam have a lot in common: Both are...
